_comment: PSAutoRBAC command -> RBAC requirement knowledge base. Each platform maps a command/operation name (case-insensitive) to the minimum role/permission set required to execute it at the given scope. Unknown commands resolve to the platform '*Default' entry and report IsKnown=false.

Connect-AzAccount.Notes: Authentication itself needs no RBAC role, but a usable session typically requires at least Reader to enumerate subscriptions and resources.

New-AzResourceGroup.Notes: Creating a resource group is a write at subscription scope.

Remove-AzResourceGroup.Notes: Deleting a resource group requires delete on the group and its contained resources.

Set-AzResourceGroup.Notes: Updating tags / properties on a resource group is a write.

New-AzRoleAssignment.Notes: Creating role assignments requires roleAssignments/write. RBAC Administrator, User Access Administrator, or Owner grant this.

New-AzStorageAccount.Notes: Creating a storage account is a write at the resource-group scope.

New-AzKeyVault.Notes: Creating a key vault is a write; data-plane access needs a separate Key Vault data role.

New-AzStorageContainer.Notes: Creating a blob container is a data-plane write; assign the data role at the storage account (or container) scope. The control-plane Contributor role does NOT grant blob data access.

Set-AzStorageBlobContent.Notes: Uploading a blob is a data-plane write; assign the data role at the storage account (or container) scope.

New-AzResource.Notes: Creating arbitrary resources requires write at the target scope; Contributor is the broad baseline.

*Default.Notes: Unknown command; defaulting to Contributor as a conservative baseline. Validate and add an explicit mapping, or use --live-probe to derive the exact action.

Connect-MgGraph.Notes: Sign-in plus delegated/app scopes; Directory Readers is the minimum to enumerate directory objects.

New-MgGroup.Notes: Creating groups requires Group.ReadWrite.All (or Groups Administrator).

New-MgGroupMember.Notes: Adding members to a group requires group membership write.

New-MgUser.Notes: Creating users requires User.ReadWrite.All (or User Administrator).

*Default.Notes: Unknown Graph command; defaulting to Directory Readers. Prefer the Graph command catalog for the exact permission.

Actions: Create workspace; tenant setting "Create workspaces" must be enabled for the principal.
New-FabricWorkspace.Notes: Workspace creation is gated by a tenant setting; the creator becomes workspace Admin.

Add-FabricWorkspaceRoleAssignment.Notes: Only a workspace Admin can manage role assignments.

New-FabricItem.Notes: Creating items (lakehouse, notebook, pipeline, etc.) requires at least Contributor.

Get-FabricItem.Notes: Reading items requires at least Viewer.

*Default.Notes: Unknown Fabric operation; defaulting to the Contributor workspace role. Admin > Member > Contributor > Viewer - a higher role satisfies a lower requirement.

Register-PurviewDataSource.Notes: Registering a data source requires Data Source Admin on the collection.

Start-PurviewScan.Notes: Triggering scans requires Data Source Admin.

Set-PurviewAsset.Notes: Editing catalog assets / classifications requires Data Curator.

Get-PurviewAsset.Notes: Reading catalog assets requires Data Reader.

*Default.Notes: Unknown Purview operation; defaulting to the Data Reader metadata-policy role. Roles are granted via collection metadata policies, not Azure role assignments.
